systems.system_notes: Public source anchor for obstetric anaesthesia workflow guidance and point-of-care educational resources.

components.component_notes: SOAP resources describe practical guidance, toolkits, and point-of-care resource access for obstetric anaesthesia.

unresolved_items.raw_text: SOAP workflow resources do not define a tray or instrument case for this obstetric workflow row.
